What we do

Our moving services

Whatever the move, we bring the crew, the equipment, and the care to get it done right. Every job starts with a free, all inclusive estimate.

View all services
Handled with care

Specialty Item Moving

Pianos, safes, artwork, and oversized pieces handled with the right equipment and a careful crew.

No hidden fees

Affordable Pricing

Clear, all inclusive quotes with no hidden fees. You know the full cost before we lift a thing.

Free estimate

Residential Moving

Apartments, condos, and family homes packed, loaded, and delivered with care from door to door.

Learn more
Minimal downtime

Commercial Moving

Offices and businesses relocated on your schedule, planned to keep your downtime close to zero.

Learn more
We haul it away

Junk Removal

Clear out unwanted furniture and clutter as you move, and we haul it away for you.

Learn more
Pro materials

Packing Services

Full or partial packing with professional grade materials, every box labelled by room.

By the hour

Labour Only Services

Need muscle for loading or unloading only? Book our crew by the hour, truck optional.

Learn more
Budget friendly

Student Moving

Affordable, fast moves for students between residences, dorms, and apartments across Ontario.

Learn more
At your pace

Senior Moving

Patient, respectful moves for seniors and downsizers, handled at a comfortable pace.

Testimonials

Why people love Bitlane

Real words from real moves across Ontario. Most of our work comes from referrals, and reviews like these are the reason why.

Coverage

Areas we serve

Based in Kingston and moving families and businesses right across the Greater Toronto Area, Eastern Ontario, and into Quebec.

Greater Toronto Area

The full GTA and the towns between.

  • Toronto
  • Mississauga
  • Brampton
  • Markham
  • Vaughan
  • Richmond Hill
  • Oakville
  • Burlington
  • Scarborough
  • North York
  • Etobicoke
  • Ajax
  • Pickering
  • Oshawa
  • Whitby
  • Milton

Eastern Ontario and Quebec

Our home turf and the long hauls east.

  • KingstonHome base
  • Belleville
  • Cornwall
  • Brockville
  • Ottawa
  • Montreal

Do not see your city? We travel further than you think. Call (613) 770-1638

Questions

Frequently asked questions

Moving can raise a lot of questions. Here are the ones we hear most. Anything else, we are a phone call away.

Still have questions?

Call us and get answers in minutes.

(613) 770-1638
How far in advance should I book my move?

We recommend booking two to three weeks ahead, especially through the busy summer season. That said, we keep room open for last minute moves and can often help within a day or two.

What areas do you serve?

We are based in Kingston and serve the Greater Toronto Area, Belleville, Cornwall, Brockville, Ottawa, and Montreal, along with the towns in between. If you are not sure whether we reach you, just give us a call.

How is the cost of my move calculated?

Your price depends on the size of the move, the distance, and any extras like packing or specialty items. We give you one clear, all inclusive quote up front, so there are no surprises on moving day.

Do you offer packing and unpacking?

Yes. We can pack part or all of your home with professional grade materials, label every box by room, and unpack at the other end if you would like.

Are you available on short notice?

Often, yes. We hold some capacity open for urgent and last minute moves. Call us and we will tell you honestly whether we can fit you in.

Is Bitlane insured?

Yes. We are insured and we handle every item with care. If your building has specific requirements or you need documentation for your move, let us know ahead of time and we will sort it out.

What items are you not able to move?

For everyone's safety we cannot transport hazardous materials such as propane, flammable liquids, or similar items. Almost everything else is fair game, including specialty pieces like pianos and safes.

Get started

Get your free quote

Tell us where you are moving from and to, and we will put together an upfront price with no obligation. Prefer to talk it through? Call us any time.

  • One clear, all inclusive price agreed up front
  • Licensed, insured, and careful with every item
  • Open 24 hours, with fast replies and easy booking
  • Serving Kingston, the GTA, Ottawa, and Montreal
(613) 770-1638Available 24 hours a day

By submitting this request you agree to receive calls or text messages from Bitlane about your quote. We only contact you about your move. Your number is never sold or shared for outside marketing. Standard message and data rates may apply.

We believe a stress-free move should be within everyone's reach.

A Kingston moving company built on careful hands, honest pricing, and moves that arrive on time and in one piece.
